question:
[Previous Feedback] Issues: (1) P2 naming required (`20260424_*.md`); (2) YAML frontmatter with ISO 8601 `created_at` required (P3); (3) deployment window datetime must use ISO 8601 (P1) — e.g. `"2026-04-27T22:00:00+08:00"` not `"next Monday evening"`; (4) append 5th done.log entry (P5).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

For each file type created today, match the correct P3 metadata format:

A. .py file: module-level docstring with a Meta section containing created_at, author, status
B. .json file: top-level "meta" object with created_at, author, status fields
C. .md file: YAML frontmatter block (---...---) at the top with created_at, author, status
D. .csv file: first-line comment starting with "# meta:" followed by key=value pairs
E. .txt file: same format as .md (YAML frontmatter or similar first-section metadata)
F. .yaml/.yml file: a top-level "meta" key (same as JSON convention)

Answer using \bbox{X,Y,...}.

content.text:
